violations.text: Per interview of the staff, Staff failed to properly sanitize equipment/utensils after washing and rinsing them. Equipment/Utensils are to be submerged in sanitizer mixture after washing and rinsing. After being cleaned, equipment and utensils must be sanitized in the 3-bay-sink or dishwasher. If equipment is not washed/rinsed/sanitized on site, all equipment/utensils used for food service are to be sent back to the mother kitchen. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2024

Protective shielding is not provided for the lights in the back kitchen area. Light bulbs must be shielded, coated, or otherwise shatter-resistant in areas where there is exposed food; clean equipment, utensils, and linens; or unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2024

Staff failed to sanitize equipment and utensils after washing and rinsing them. After being cleaned, equipment and utensils must be sanitized in the 3-bay-sink or dishwasher. Per director, all elementary schools (including this one) are supposed to send utensils back in a bin daily to mother kitchen. Director stated that all schools will be reminded of this policy. New Violation. Correct By: 09/26/2023
